Name: QwcJudge
Description: Determines the parameters for world tendency effects.

Fields.Name: Player: Black Condition
Fields.Description: The value that triggers the black player world tendency state.

Fields.Name: Player: White Condition
Fields.Description: The value that triggers the white player world tendency state.

Fields.Name: Player: Left Condition
Fields.Description: The value that triggers the left player world tendency state.

Fields.Name: Player: Right Condition
Fields.Description: The value that triggers the right player world tendency state.

Fields.Name: Area: Black Condition
Fields.Description: The value that triggers the black area world tendency state.

Fields.Name: Area: White Condition
Fields.Description: The value that triggers the white area world tendency state.

Fields.Name: Area: Left Condition
Fields.Description: The value that triggers the left area world tendency state.

Fields.Name: Area: Right Condition
Fields.Description: The value that triggers the right area world tendency state.
